CAPITOL OFFICE ADDRESS
STATE CAPITOL BUILDING
P.O BOX 942849
SACRAMENTO, CA 94249-0001
(916) 445-8211

DISTRICT OFFICE ADDRESS
333 SOUTH JUNIPER
SUITE 214
ESCONDIDO, CA 92025
(619) 489-8974

42-800 BOB HOPE DRIVE
SUITE 209K
RANCHO MIRAGE, CA 92270
(619) 568-0357

Assembly
California Legislature

COMMITTEES:
EDUCATION
HUMAN SERVICES
JOINT COMMITTEE ON
MENTAL HEALTH RESEARCH

TRICIA RAE HUNTER
ASSEMBLYWOMAN, SEVENTY-SIXTH DISTRICT

February 26, 1990

Mr. John Rothman
FPPC
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0814

Dear Mr. Rothman,

Per our conversation on 02/22/90, it is my
understanding that we need not list the following items
on our financial disclosure list:

1)9/7/89- Air fare to Oakland. CNA guest
speaker.
2)9/23/89-Lodging CNA convention.

(please see attached)

As these events were legislative business, you
informed me that under #18708 paragraph A of the FPPC
regulations, Assemblywoman Hunter need not report the
above mentioneditems on her financial statement. I
would greatly appreciate a written response to this
letter. Thank you very much.

Sincerely,

KELLEY FARRIS
Chief Administrative Assistant

encl.

KELLY:

CNA PAC ID 780-657 has contributed to Tricia during this fiscal year:

3/31    Committee to Elect Tricia Hunter         890811    $3,500.        Contribution

10/3    Committee to Elect Tricia Hunter         890811    $600.00        (In Kind - Get out
                                                                           Vote)

10/3    Committee to Elect Tricia Hunter         890311    29__  5,000.    Contribution

        CNA Employer Report - Lobbying for Jan-Feb-Mar '90 will show:

        Cost of reception held January 2, 1990 benefit per person cost $26.88 (paid by PAC)

ALSO FOR PREVIOUS QUARTER 7/1/89-9/30/89 Employer report as follows:

                                                                           PAGE    3    OF    4

NAME OF FILER: CALIFORNIA NURSES ASSOCIATION          PERIOD COVERED: 7/1/09 - 9/30/89

C. ACTIVITY EXPENSES (See instructions on reverse.)

Date | Name and Address of Payee | Name and Official Position of Honorable Persons and Amount Benefiting Each | Description of Consideration | Amount of Activity

9/6 | Irene Agnus (U.S. Air) 1100 11th Street #200 Sacramento, CA 95814 | Tricia Hunter President, BRN & Candidate, Assembly District 76 | $ 60.00 Air Fare CNA meeting | $ 60.00

9/7 | The Travel Place | " | 98.00 Air Fare Guest Speaker CNA Convention 9/23 Oakland | 98.00

9/23 | Hyatt Regency-Oakland 1001 Broadway Oakland, CA 94607-4077 | " | 97.90 Lodging 9/23 CNA Convention | 97.90

[empty rows]

☐ If more space is needed, check box and attach continuation sheets. | TOTAL SECTION C (Activity Expenses). Also enter the total of Section C on Line C of the Summary of Payments section on page 1. | $ 255.90
